data.title: Tesla Sold SpaceX $143 Million Worth Of Cars: SEC Filing
data.description: According to a recent SEC filing update, Tesla sold electric vehicles to SpaceX, a company owned by CEO Elon Musk. The sale amounted to approximately $143 million. Following this news, Tesla's stock has increased by around 1%.

data.title: BURN Launches BUILD, a New Strength Training Concept
data.description: Maria Chase, creator of the successful BURN method and studios, has introduced BUILD, a new modality that emphasizes results and longevity. It is the initial strength training concept to combine progressive heavy lifting with low infrared heat and medical-grade LED|NIR red light in a single program.

data.title: PJM Board Names David E. Mills as PJM President and CEO
data.description: David E. Mills has been appointed as the fifth permanent CEO to oversee the nation's largest electric grid situated in Valley Forge, Pennsylvania starting from May 1, 2026. The PJM Interconnection's Board of Managers made the announcement, confirming Mills' new position.

data.title: Lumicell Showcases Expanded Scientific and Clinical Engagement at ASBrS 2026 Annual Meeting
data.description: On May 1, 2026, Seattle-based company Lumicell revealed an increase in their participation at the American Society of Breast Surgeons (ASBrS) 2026 Annual Meeting, happening from April 29 to May 3, 2026. Lumicell specializes in intraoperative fluorescence imaging technology to aid in breast cancer surgery. This technology aims to enhance surgical precision and improve patient outcomes. The company's extended presence at the conference signifies a deepening commitment to advancing breast cancer treatment.
Iran remains deeply distrustful of the US, Iranian source tells CNN

data.title: LP Building Solutions Announces Quarterly Dividend
data.description: Louisiana-Pacific Corporation, based in Nashville, Tennessee, announced a quarterly cash dividend of $0.30 per share for its common stockholders. The dividend is payable to shareholders recorded as of May 14, 2026.

data.title: Tether posts $1B profit in Q1 despite crypto dip, claims $141B in US Treasuries. Full audit underway.
data.description: Tether, a prominent stablecoin issuer, claims to possess more than $141 billion in U.S. Treasuries. This amount has not been validated through a comprehensive audit process.

data.title: Avangrid’s Inaugural Prompt-a-thon Advances People Centric AI Literacy for Early Career Professionals
data.description: Avangrid, located in Orange, Connecticut, recently held a groundbreaking event aimed at empowering future energy leaders to leverage artificial intelligence in addressing business obstacles. This event marks the first of its kind, highlighting the company's commitment to innovation and transformation in the energy sector. Attendees were provided with valuable insights and tools to harness AI successfully, positioning them as pioneers in the field. Avangrid's initiative underscores a strategic focus on nurturing talent and embracing cutting-edge technologies to drive growth and sustainability.
BP SAID TO REVIEW UK NORTH SEA ASSETS AS NEW CEO EYES DISPOSALS

data.title: Alaska Air Downgraded To Sell, Discount Carriers Request Emergency Fuel Funds
data.description: Discount airline companies have jointly asked for $2.5 billion in emergency financial assistance due to the significant increase in fuel prices. Alaska Air's stock received a double downgrade to 'Sell'.

data.title: Merck's Biggest Looming Rival In Cancer Just Took A Gut Punch
data.description: On Friday, Summit Therapeutics experienced a significant drop in its stock value following the announcement that its lung cancer treatment did not meet expectations in an interim analysis. This setback comes as the company faces strong competition from Merck in the cancer treatment market. The news led to a substantial decrease in Summit Therapeutics' stock price, raising concerns among investors and industry watchers. The development highlights the challenges the company is facing in the competitive landscape of cancer therapeutics.

data.title: Tesla Rivals BYD, Geely, Xiaomi See Sales Bump. These China EV Makers Decline.
data.description: In April, there was a noticeable increase in deliveries for BYD, Geely, Leap, and Xiaomi as the auto industry continues to introduce new models. On the other hand, Li Auto and Nio experienced a decline in sales during the same period. This surge in sales was observed among Tesla's competitors, with BYD, Geely, and Xiaomi showing positive growth trends, while Li Auto and Nio faced a decline.

data.title: Chevron, Exxon Earnings Show Resilience But Oil Stocks Retreat
data.description: Amidst tensions in Iran, Exxon and Chevron reported earnings that surpassed expectations, driven by an increase in production volumes. Both companies displayed resilience in the face of challenges. However, oil stocks experienced a retreat following the news. This highlights the ability of Exxon and Chevron to perform well in tough economic conditions.

data.title: Maryland's new law bans AI-driven price hikes in grocery stores, starting in October. No consumer data for increases.
data.description: Starting in October, a new state law will prevent grocery stores and third-party delivery services from using consumer data to increase prices. This ruling aims to protect consumers by ensuring that their shopping habits and personal information are not exploited for financial gain. The law represents a significant step in safeguarding consumer interests as it prohibits the manipulation of data to inflate prices.

data.title: inMorphis Accelerates the AI-Native Enterprise: Unveiling a High-Velocity Implementation Framework for ServiceNow AI at Knowledge 2026
data.description: In the tech industry, inMorphis, supported by investment from ServiceNow, a leading player, has integrated its delivery system with the recently launched ServiceNow Context Engine and AI Control Tower. This move aims to translate the advanced features of the platform into tangible business outcomes. The development was announced on May 1, 2026 in Las Vegas.
U.S. APRIL WORKERS ON STRIKE 1,400

data.title: PetMade Formulates Veterinarian-Approved Dog Supplements for Heart Health Featuring CoQ10 and Omega-3s
data.description: A company in Manassas, Virginia, announced on May 1, 2026, that PetMade has introduced a series of cardiovascular support formulas for dogs. These formulas, approved by veterinarians, aim to uphold healthy circulation, cellular energy, and overall vitality in dogs. The products consist of high-quality ingredients that are easily absorbed by the body, and were developed in consultation with veterinary professionals.

data.title: Dr. Pol Launches Non-Prescription Clinical Nutrition Dog Food Line Available Exclusively at Walmart
data.description: Dr. Jan Pol, a trusted veterinarian, has developed a non-prescription dog food tailored to address common canine issues and serve as an alternative to prescription pet food. Formulated with expertise, this dog food provides targeted nutritional support. The product will be launched in WEIDMAN, Michigan on May 1, 2026. Dr. Pol's expanding pet care portfolio includes this innovative solution for pet owners, offering effective nutritional support without the need for a prescription.

data.title: Trucordia Acquires Paradiso Insurance, Strengthening New England Presence and Main Street Focus
data.description: Today, in Lindon, Utah, Trucordia, one of the top 20 insurance brokerages in the U.S., revealed its acquisition of Paradiso Financial and Insurance Services in Stafford Springs, Connecticut. This strategic move brings Paradiso's well-established business into Trucordia's fold, marking a significant development in the industry. Paradiso Insurance, known for its excellent service, has garnered a loyal customer base in the region.

data.title: ImpediMed Broadens Breast Cancer Survivorship Monitoring with the SOZO® Digital Health Platform at ASBrS 2026
data.description: Key presentations at the American Society of Breast Surgeons conference in 2026 emphasized the significance of tracking body composition, Bioimpedance Spectroscopy (BIS), and monitoring for lymphedema in breast cancer treatment. Held in Carlsbad, Calif., the event featured critical research findings on these topics. One of the prominent companies showcasing their advancements was ImpediMed, renowned for its innovative medical solutions for monitoring and addressing fluid levels and body composition. The conference highlighted the growing importance of incorporating such technologies in breast cancer care.
